issues.title: Voicebox API spike: 3 design variations strategy
issues.body:
## Intent
Voicebox OpenAPI prüfen und Variation-Strategie für 3 Design-Kandidaten festlegen.

## Solution
- OpenAPI 0.5.0: kein Candidates-Endpoint → Strategie A2 (3× designed profiles)
- Dokumentation in `.qa/design/mve-voice-design-studio.md` § Variation Strategy

## Acceptance
- [ ] API-Entscheidung dokumentiert
- [ ] DELETE/PUT Profile bestätigt

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/mve-voice-design-studio.md`

issues.title: Preview workflow: 3 candidates, play, save with name
dependsOn: Voicebox API spike: 3 design variations strategy
issues.body:
## Intent
Stimme erzeugen zeigt 3 Kandidaten mit Play; Speichern mit Namen weist Charakter zu.

## User Journey
1. Beschreibung eingeben → Stimme erzeugen
2. 3 Varianten A/B/C mit Play
3. Speichern → Name → Dropdown + MVE

## Solution
- `preview-voice-design-candidates.ts`, `save-voice-design-candidate.ts`
- `VoiceDesignCandidateList`, `VoiceDesignSaveDialog`
- `deleteVoiceboxProfile`, `updateVoiceboxProfile` in voicebox-api

## Acceptance
- [ ] 3 Kandidaten ohne sofortige Zuweisung
- [ ] Play + Save mit Name
- [ ] Temp-Profile cleanup
- [ ] Playwright spec grün

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/mve-voice-design-studio.md`

issues.title: Basic/Advanced tabs + voice design compiler + tooltips
dependsOn: Preview workflow: 3 candidates, play, save with name
issues.body:
## Intent
Basic-Freitext und Advanced-Template mit Tooltips; Compiler erzeugt design_prompt.

## Solution
- `MveVoiceDesignSpec`, `compile-voice-design-prompt.ts`
- `VoiceDesignDescriptionPanel` mit Tabs
- `voice-design-field-help.ts`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Tabs Basic/Advanced
- [ ] Compiler Golden-Tests
- [ ] Tooltips pro Feld

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/mve-voice-design-studio.md`

issues.title: design_spec_json migration + description roundtrip
dependsOn: Basic/Advanced tabs + voice design compiler + tooltips
issues.body:
## Intent
Advanced-Spec und Beschreibung in SQLite; beim Voice-Select zurückladen.

## Solution
- Schema v7: `design_spec_json`
- Save persistiert designSpec
- Modal lädt bei Voice-Wechsel

## Acceptance
- [ ] Migration v7
- [ ] Roundtrip Unit-Test
- [ ] Playwright: Beschreibung nach Select

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/mve-voice-design-studio.md`

issues.title: Provider prompt compiler + render params (deferred)
issues.body:
## Intent
Universelles DesignSpec → provider-spezifische Prompts und technische Render-Parameter.

## Solution
- `voice-prompt-compiler.ts`, `provider-voice-capabilities.ts`
- Erweiterte `MveVoiceRenderSettings`
- Voicebox adapter `supportsVoiceGenerationFromPrompt: true`

## Acceptance
- [ ] compileForProvider Tests
- [ ] Technisch-Accordion im Advanced-Tab

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/mve-voice-design-studio.md`
